data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Instagram employs a microservices architecture to ensure scalability and flexibility.
data.technical_spec: Multiple independent services communicating over HTTP APIs, typically using RESTful standards.

data.title: NoSQL Database Integration
data.description: Utilizes NoSQL databases for handling large volumes of user-generated content.
data.technical_spec: Primarily uses databases like Apache Cassandra for distributed, scalable storage.

data.title: GraphQL API
data.description: Provides a flexible API interface that allows clients to request exactly what they need.
data.technical_spec: GraphQL implemented over HTTP, allows for dynamic queries and efficient data retrieval.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN) Utilization
data.description: CDNs are used to ensure fast, reliable content delivery globally.
data.technical_spec: Partnership with global CDN providers like Akamai and Cloudflare.

data.title: Service-Oriented On-prem and Cloud Integration
data.description: Integration of on-premises services with cloud-based resources for optimal performance.
data.technical_spec: Hybrid solutions, leveraging AWS and in-house data centers.
